title: Adhi Karya secured new contracts of IDR 12 trillion until July 2024
body: PT Adhi Karya (Persero) Tbk (ADHI), a state-owned building construction company, managed to record new contracts worth IDR 12 trillion until July 2024.

title: Revenue slumped, TOPS suffers another loss in first half
body: PT Totalindo Eka Persada Tbk (TOPS), a building construction issuer, only posted revenue of IDR 42 billion in the first semester (1H) 2024.

title: DMAS optimistic in achieving pre-sales target
body: PT Puradelta Lestari Tbk (DMAS), developer of the Delta Mas Industrial Area, is optimistic about achieving its marketing sales target of IDR 1.81 trillion by the end of 2024.

title: Back to core business, PTPP intensifies asset divestment
body: PT PP (Persero) Tbk (PTPP) plans to divest its subsidiary's share assets this year to support its strategy to refocus on its core business line, namely construction.

title: New contracts slipped in August, PTPP still on for IDR 32 T this year
body: PT PP (Persero) Tbk (PTPP) recorded new contracts of IDR 17.4 trillion until August (8M) 2024, down from IDR 22.56 trillion recorded in 8M 2023.

title: Adhi Karya secured new contracts of IDR 12 trillion until July 2024
body: PT Adhi Karya (Persero) Tbk (ADHI), a state-owned building construction company, managed to record new contracts worth IDR 12 trillion until July 2024.

title: Revenue slumped, TOPS suffers another loss in first half
body: PT Totalindo Eka Persada Tbk (TOPS), a building construction issuer, only posted revenue of IDR 42 billion in the first semester (1H) 2024.

title: DMAS optimistic in achieving pre-sales target
body: PT Puradelta Lestari Tbk (DMAS), developer of the Delta Mas Industrial Area, is optimistic about achieving its marketing sales target of IDR 1.81 trillion by the end of 2024.

title: Back to core business, PTPP intensifies asset divestment
body: PT PP (Persero) Tbk (PTPP) plans to divest its subsidiary's share assets this year to support its strategy to refocus on its core business line, namely construction.

title: New contracts slipped in August, PTPP still on for IDR 32 T this year
body: PT PP (Persero) Tbk (PTPP) recorded new contracts of IDR 17.4 trillion until August (8M) 2024, down from IDR 22.56 trillion recorded in 8M 2023.

title: BREN to work with Ayala Group from Philippines for wind farm project
body: PT Barito Renewables Energy Tbk (BREN) announces its latest collaboration with Ayala Group, an energy company from the Philippines, to develop wind power plant.

title: JCI remains sluggish all day
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) stopped at 7,597.88 at today’s (27/8) closing bell, lower than JCI’s opening position at 7,605.19 at 9 AM WIB.

title: Tight on liquidity, BTN eyes moderate credit growth at 10-11% this year
body: PT Bank Tabungan Negara Tbk (BBTN) reveals its moderate target on credit distribution growth in 2024, at 10-11%. In fact, at the end of June 2024, BBTN had reported credit growth of 14.4% year-on-year (yoy).

title: Aneka Tambang plans to purchase Freeport’s gold to boost sales
body: PT Aneka Tambang Tbk (ANTM), a metal and mineral mining under the state-owned mining holding company, MIND ID, will join hands with PT Freeport Indonesia to maintain gold product supply.

title: Multivision Plus to set up private placement, issuing 619.42 million shares
body: PT Tripar Multivision Plus Tbk (RAAM), a production house for movies and series, will issue 619.42 million shares via a private placement on September 26, 2024.

title: BBTN: 2 years from now, BTN Syariah will be the 2nd biggest sharia bank in Indonesia
body: Nixon LP Napitupulu, President Director of PT Bank Tabungan Negara Tbk (BBTN), announces its vision prepared for its sharia business unit, Bank Tabungan Negara Syariah, for the next two years.

title: BMRI confident of profit growth in H2 2024
body: PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI) is optimistic to see its profit increasing in the second half of 2024, as credit distribution is projected to grow according to the target of 16-18% year-on-year (yoy).

title: Sari Roti readies Pekanbaru factory to support western area sales
body: PT Nippon Indosari Corpindo Tbk (ROTI), or popularly known as Sari Roti and Sari Kue, reveals that the construction of its latest production facility in Pekanbaru, Riau, will be completed in the fourth quarter of 2024.

title: Foreign buy reaches 2.32 billion shares, net foreign volume surplus at 458.45 million shares
body: Share purchase transactions on Friday, August 23, resulted in foreign buying volume reaching 2.32 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign sales volume was only around 1.86 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume surplus of 458.45 million shares. The most shares purchased belonged to the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), namely 709.38 million shares, with a net volume of 375.86 million shares.

title: MotoGP Mandalika 2024, Prime Park Hotel’s occupancy rate soared 90%
body: PT PP Properti Tbk (PPRO) reported 90% year-on-year (yoy) surge in occupancy rate of Prime Park Hotel & Convention Lombok following MotoGP Mandalika 2024 that will be held on September 27-30, 2024.

title: Bukit Asam targets coals sales to reach 43.1 million tons this year
body: PT Bukit Asam Tbk (PTBA), a coal mining company under PT Mineral Industri Indonesia (Persero) or MIND ID, is targeting coals sales volume this year to reach 43.1 million tons.

title: WIFI confident in telco business as new engine growth
body: The management of PT Solusi Sinergi Digital Tbk (WIFI), or mostly known as Surge, expressed their optimism towards its telecommunication infrastructure (telco) business line, which is deemed capable to be the main engine growth for its performance in the future.

title: Digital business triumphed, Bank Raya’s credit growth hit 12.1%
body: PT Bank Raya Indonesia Tbk (AGRO) booked credit distribution growth of 12.1% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 6.8 trillion in the second quarter (Q2) of 2024, supported by enhancement in its digital business line.

title: Morning session caught JCI slipping
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) slipped to 7,565.78 right after the opening bell today (27/8) at 9.25 AM WIB. This trend is in contrast with the opening position at Monday (26/8), which arrived at 7,600.

title: Prioritising CASA, DPK of BTPS slipped 5% in H1 2024
body: PT Bank BTPN Syariah Tbk (BTPS) saw a decline in third-party funds (DPK) by 5% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 11.76 trillion in June 2024 from IDR 12.38 trillion seen in June 2023.

title: ELSA to realise capex of IDR 188 billion
body: PT Elnusa Tbk (ELSA) has realised capital expenditure of IDR 188 billion or 36% of total allocated budget of IDR 526 billion this year.

title: GEMS extends period and increases credit ceiling for Borneo Indobara
body: PT Golden Energy Mines Tbk (GEMS), a mining company owned by Sinarmas Group, has signed an addendum to the credit agreement given to PT Borneo Indobara (BIB).

title: PGAS net profit soars 28.4% in first semester
body: PT Perusahaan Gas Negara Tbk (PGAS) posted a net profit of US$186.6 million in the first semester (1H) 2024, growing 28.4% year-on-year (yoy) or from the same semester last year.

title: IDX terminates 5 employees due to alleged gratification
body: The authority of Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) reportedly terminates the employment of 5 staffs in Listing Division following alleged gratification for allowing issuers to be listed in the stock exchange.

title: Opening the week, JCI saw positive shifts all day
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) gained strength, arriving at 7,610.23 at today’s (26/8) closing bell.

title: Aiming for 70 thousand tons production, Vale Indonesia eyes local factories for nickel ore sales
body: After securing the extension of its Special Mining Business License (IUPK) last May, PT Vale Indonesia Tbk (INCO) is now confident to be able to attain nickel in matte production target of 70,800 wet metric tons (wmt) in 2024.

title: Supporting nickel downstreaming, Vale Indonesia realised 29.6% of capex in June 2024
body: PT Vale Indonesia Tbk (INCO), an integrated nickel mining company, reported capital expenditure (capex) deployment of USD 118.5 million at the end of June 2024, or equal to 29.6% of total capex budgeted this year.

title: Spindo to allocate capex of IDR 250 billion
body: PT Steel Pipe Industry of Indonesia Tbk (ISSP) or Spindo is allocating capital expenditure (capex) of IDR 250 billion this year.

title: Foreign buy and sell volume comparable, net foreign volume closed at -114.84 million shares
body: On Thursday, August 22, foreign investors' stock purchasing and selling activity was nearly equal, with a foreign buying volume of 2.04 billion shares and a foreign selling volume of 2.16 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume ended at -114.84 million shares. On the top buy list, the most shares purchased belonged to the banking company PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI), namely 350.72 million shares, with a net volume of 161.21 million shares.

title: Jinxin Fertility Group takes part in Morula Indonesia, BMHS bags IDR 351.7 billion
body: PT Morula Indonesia (MI), a subsidiary of PT Bundamedik Tbk (BMHS) engaged in in-vitro fertilisation (IVF), welcomes its newest shareholder, Jinxin Fertility Group (Jinxin).

title: Ijen’s geothermal project by Medco Energy reported 93% completion
body: PT Medco Energi Tbk (MEDC), an oil and gas company that slowly branches out to renewable energy sector, revealed that the construction project of Geothermal Power Plant of Ijen has reached 93% of target.

title: Telkom Indonesia confident on positive performance and profitability
body: PT Telkom Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (TLKM), a telecommunication company with the biggest market capitalisation in Indonesia, is confident that it will be able to drive positive growth in performance, as well as generating profit by the end of 2024.

title: VTNY to reach Eastern Indonesia
body: PT Venteny Fortuna International Tbk (VTNY) will expand its branch office to Eastern Indonesia, pursuing the opportunity in financing for micro, small, and medium enterprises (MSMEs).

title: Solid operational aspects post-COVID, BMHS saw profit surge of nearly 200%
body: As of June 2024, PT Bundamedik Tbk (BMHS) reported slight increase in revenue of 9% year-on-year (yoy) compared to H1 2021.

title: Telkom to focus on sustainable revenue through Five Bold Moves strategy
body: PT Telkom Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (TLKM) accelerates its Five Bold Moves (5BM) strategy, which will be realised through its FMC, InfraCo, and Data Centre businesses, as an implementation of an optimum business transformation.
